My Name is Khan (2010)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $4,046,336Details
International Box Office $38,309,190
Worldwide Box Office $42,355,526
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$1,944,027 (48.0% of total gross)
Legs:2.08 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:9.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$8,470,000 (worldwide box office is 5.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:120 opening theaters/125 max. theaters, 4.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $5,800,266

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 12th, 2010 (Limited) by Fox Searchlight
International Releases: January 5th, 2012 (Wide) (Hong Kong)
Video Release: August 10th, 2010 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for some violence, sexual content and language.
(Rating bulletin 2108, 2/17/2010)
PG-13 for some violence, sexual content and language.
(Rating bulletin 2132, 8/4/2010)
Running Time: 161 minutes
Plot point: Autism, Bigotry, Falsely Accused, FBI, Indians, Political, Road Trip, Terrorism
Subgenre: Life Drama
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production Countries: India, United States
Languages: Hindi, English
